---
title: "Agentic AI"
subtitle: "Introduction to Big Data in Social Sciences"
author: Laurence-Olivier M. Foisy
institute: Université de Montréal
lang: en
from: markdown+emoji
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    logo: img/udem.png
    footer: "[FAS1001](https://fas1001.com)"
    transition: none
    transition-speed: fast
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    highlight-style: github
    embed-resources: true
---

## Course Structure

![](img/structure_cours_en.png)

## Course Structure

![](img/structure_cours_1.png)

## Course Structure

![](img/structure_cours_2.png)

## Assignment 3

![](img/tp3.png){.absolute top=250 right=150}

## {background-image="img/llm_text.png"}

# Agentic AI

## What is an Agent?

::: {.r-stack}

![](img/007.png){.absolute top=320 right=800 .fragment}


![](img/smith.png){.absolute top=350 right=-100 .fragment}

![](img/47.png){.absolute top=-100 right=-200 style="transform: rotate(-180deg);" width="40%" .fragment}

:::

## What is an Agent?

::: {.r-stack}

![](img/remax.png){.absolute top=200 right=-100 .fragment}

![](img/voyage.png){.absolute top=250 right=600 .fragment width="70%"}

:::

## What is an Agent?

An agent is an autonomous entity mandated to act in the world to produce an effect on behalf of an objective or a principal.

- **Delegation**

- **Autonomy**

- **Effectiveness** 

## So?

Agentic AI is a way to have a LLM perform actions.


### How? 

LLMs only generate text?

## So?

Agentic AI is a way to have a LLM perform actions.

### How?

![](img/Gnu-bash-logo.svg)

## LLM - Text Generation

![](img/llm_isole_texte_seulement_en.svg)

## LLM - Taking Actions

![](img/claude_code_pont_local_cloud_en.svg)

## Tools

::::{.columns}

:::{.column width="50%"}

### Terminal

- Claude Code
- Codex
- Gemini-cli
- OpenCode
- Crush

:::

:::{.column width="50%"}

### IDE/UI

- Cursor
- GitHub Copilot
- Claude Desktop / Cowork
- Etc. 

:::

::::

# MCP

::: {.r-stack}

![](img/consensus.png){.absolute top=320 right=800 .fragment}

![](img/notion.png){.absolute top=350 right=400 .fragment}

![](img/drive.png){.absolute top=200 right=300 .fragment}

![](img/brave.png){.absolute top=-100 right=200 .fragment}

![](img/github.png){.absolute top=100 right=600}

:::

## What is an MCP? {background="black"}

![](img/api_vs_mcp_flow.svg){.absolute top=200 right=100 width="110%"}


# 

![](img/openclaw.png)

## 

![](img/openclaw_github.png)

##

![](img/clawhub.png)

##

![](img/clawhub_skill.png)

## 

![](img/moltbook.png)

## What Can We Do with Agents?

- Automated data collection 

- Data cleaning (Tidy Data) 

- Simulation of social data?

- Do you have any ideas?

# Installing OpenClaw?
